title: Sub-plan 5: Publish Export
description: Platform tabs (eBay/Poshmark) from platform_fields JSONB, per-field Copy buttons, Copy All, listing URL input, SEO audit checklist, status transitions finalizing→published. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/05-publish-export.md (not yet written). Done when: can copy all eBay fields, paste listing URL, and listing transitions to published.

title: Sub-plan 4: Dashboard + Workspace UI
description: Dashboard: listing card grid, status badges, cooking spinner, drag-and-drop upload, Realtime subscriptions, toast queue. Workspace: split layout (photos + photo plan + inclusions + fields | agent chat), photo reorder, pricing evidence drawer, auth checklist, failed step retry button. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/04-ui.md (not yet written). Done when: 3 dropped photos create 3 live-updating cards.

title: Sub-plan 3: Agent System
description: skills/agent-skills.md flat file (all brand/category knowledge), system prompt in lib/agent/system-prompt.ts, cache-optimized context assembly, 6 thick agent tools (research_pricing, get_auth_checklist, build_description, update_listing, get_listing_summary, get_photo_plan), streaming agent chat API route, mcp-exec integration. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/03-agent-system.md (not yet written). Done when: agent chat streams a real pricing response with comp data.

title: Sub-plan 2: Intake Pipeline
description: Full Inngest workflow: Step 1 (Google Lens/SerpAPI), Step 2 (Claude vision + photo plan), ID verification gate, Step 3 (pricing comps), Step 4a (Claude draft) + Step 4b (PhotoRoom, parallel), Step 5 (auth plan, luxury only), photo quality gate, retry-step handler, Realtime pushes. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/02-intake-pipeline.md (not yet written). Done when: uploading a real photo runs all 5 steps and dashboard updates live.

title: Sub-plan 1: Project Scaffold
description: Bootstrap Next.js 15 + Supabase schema (4 tables, SKU system, RLS, Realtime) + Inngest skeleton pipeline + app shell + smoke test. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/01-scaffold.md. Done when: photo/uploaded event → listing flips to in_loop in DB.
